title: Encryption algorithms should be used with secure mode and padding scheme
description: Ensures that encryption algorithms are used with secure mode (openssl_ssl_set_options) and padding scheme (openssl_ssl_set_cipher_list)
message: Encryption algorithm should be used with secure mode and padding scheme
recommendation: Use secure mode and padding scheme for encryption algorithms

noncompliant.description: Uses encryption algorithm without secure mode and padding scheme

compliant.description: Uses encryption algorithm with secure mode and padding scheme

why_is_this_an_issue: Using encryption algorithms without secure mode and padding scheme can lead to data vulnerability and unauthorized access
how_to_fix: Ensure that secure mode and padding scheme are set for the encryption algorithm

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if encryption algorithms are used with secure mode and padding scheme
